title: Assistant Professor of Computer Science
description: The Department of Computer Science at Stanford University invites applications for a tenure-track Assistant Professor position. We seek candidates with a strong research agenda in areas including machine learning, systems, theory, or human-computer interaction.
qualifications: PhD in Computer Science or related field. Demonstrated research excellence. Evidence of teaching ability.

title: Postdoctoral Researcher in Genomics
description: Seeking a motivated postdoctoral researcher to join our genomics lab. The successful candidate will work on cutting-edge projects in computational biology and next-generation sequencing.
qualifications: PhD in Biology, Bioinformatics, or related field. Experience with Python/R. Strong publication record.

title: Dean of Student Affairs
description: MIT seeks an experienced Dean of Student Affairs to lead initiatives supporting student wellbeing, academic success, and campus life. The Dean will oversee a diverse team and collaborate with faculty and administrators.
qualifications: PhD or equivalent. 10+ years experience in higher education administration. Strong leadership skills.

title: Lecturer in Mathematics
description: The Department of Mathematics invites applications for a full-time Lecturer position. Responsibilities include teaching undergraduate mathematics courses and contributing to curriculum development.
qualifications: PhD in Mathematics. Teaching experience at the university level. Strong communication skills.

title: Research Laboratory Manager
description: We are seeking a Research Laboratory Manager to oversee day-to-day operations of a busy neurobiology research lab. Responsibilities include lab safety, budget management, and training new researchers.
qualifications: MSc or PhD in biological sciences. Lab management experience. Strong organizational skills.

title: Associate Professor of History
description: The Department of History seeks an Associate Professor specializing in 20th-century American history. The successful candidate will teach undergraduate and graduate courses and maintain an active research program.
qualifications: PhD in History. Published monograph preferred. Commitment to mentoring graduate students.

title: Graduate Admissions Coordinator
description: Coordinate graduate admissions processes, review applications, communicate with prospective students, and support recruitment events.
qualifications: Bachelor's degree required, Master's preferred. 2+ years in admissions or higher education. Excellent communication skills.

title: Visiting Scholar in Philosophy
description: One-year visiting scholar position in the Department of Philosophy. The scholar will pursue independent research and deliver a public lecture series.
qualifications: PhD in Philosophy. Established research record. Strong interest in collaborative work.
